name: pomodocs/commonmark-template-renderer
description: CommonMark extension to render html via template engines

scripts-descriptions.check: Perform all tests and analysis, required before submitting a pull request
scripts-descriptions.cs:check: Run code style analysis, without fixing errors
scripts-descriptions.cs:fix: Run code style analysis and fix errors
scripts-descriptions.coverage: Create a code coverage report and diplay it in the terminal
scripts-descriptions.coverage:html: Create a code coverage report in html format, into the `coverage/` directory
scripts-descriptions.coverage:clover: Create a code coverage report in xml format, into the `clover.xml` file

suggest.latte/latte: To render templates using Latte (not supported yet)
suggest.league/plates: To render templates using Plates (not supported yet)
suggest.eftec/bladeone: To render templates using Blade (not supported yet)
